description: Style NoteInspired from India's rich jewel history, this pair of earrings from royal diadem is sure to become a love-forever statement piece in your jewellery box. Style this with matching ethnic suits or saris or wear it with a monochrome ensemble for an interesting fusion vibe. This piece is guaranteed to give your look an instant boho edge (if it's a Western outfit) or a refined polish (if paired with ethnic wear)Product Details Teardrop shaped base with pearl-like stones at the periphery and a green centre stone and green petal-like stones around the baseA heavy jumkha (a bell shaped dangler) hanging from the base with pearl embellishmentsA green bead dangles from the inside of the jumkhaEarring post and back closureMaterial and CareMetalWipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 9.5 cm
